  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 (4 GB VRAM) or AMD Radeon RX 570 / RX 6500 XT (4 GB VRAM) or equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Target 60 FPS at 1080p with High or Ultra settings. A fast SSD is recommended for the smoothest experience. Ray tracing is not required and may significantly reduce performance on the listed GPUs.
